{{/* A responsive grid wrapping a set of `card` shortcodes. Usage: {{< cardgroup cols="2" >}} {{< card title="Why Modelplane" href="/overview/why/" >}} The problem it solves and the alternatives. {{< /card >}} {{< card title="How it works" href="/overview/how-it-works/" >}} The architecture and what happens when you deploy a model. {{< /card >}} {{< /cardgroup >}} Params: cols optional fixed column count (2, 3, 4). Defaults to an auto-fill grid. */}} {{- $cols := .Get "cols" -}}
{{ .Inner }}
